frames.caption: Cursor on `q`.
frames.narration: *normal mode.* We'll run `dw`: the delete operator with the word motion.

frames.caption: `dw` — `quick ` deleted.
frames.narration: Operator `d` (verb) plus motion `w` (noun). The same grammar applies for any operator+motion pair.

frames.caption: `gUw` — `BROWN` uppercased.
frames.narration: Swap the operator for `gU` (uppercase), keep motion `w`. Free upgrade — every motion works with every operator.
